channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar - Current
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records with status Current from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Carboplatin Injection (0703-4239-01)
item.description: Carboplatin, Injection, 10 mg/1 mL (NDC 0703-4239-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-05-01 Company: Teva Pharmaceuticals USA, Inc. Estimated recovery: June 2026
